items.h: AEW announces date and location for next Grand Slam event
items.p: AEW announced that AEW Grand Slam: Mexico will return to Arena Mexico on Aug. 5. Tickets for the event will go on sale on June 6 at 11 a.m. ET at AEWTix.com and Ticketmaster.com.mx. ARTICLE [...]

items.p: They might not be on the same page now, but AEW's Kevin Knight believes "Speedball" Mike Bailey is on the level of Albert Einstein and Deion Sanders.
